description: 最常用的打招呼用语。全天适用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hello! How are you today?","zh":"你好！你今天怎么样？"}]

description: 再见。口语也常说Bye或See you。
examples_json: [{"en":"Goodbye! See you tomorrow.","zh":"再见！明天见。"}]

description: 姓名。My name is... = 我叫...。
examples_json: [{"en":"My name is Li Ming.","zh":"我叫李明。"}]

description: I'm from... = 我来自...。后接国家或城市。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm from China.","zh":"我来自中国。"}]

description: 数字1。基数词的基本单位。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have one book.","zh"::我有一本书。"}]

description: 数字10。注意与teen的区别：13是thirteen，30是thirty。
examples_json: [{"en":"There are ten students in the room.","zh":"房间里有十个学生。"}]

description: 一百。one hundred = 100。
examples_json: [{"en":"The book costs one hundred yuan.","zh":"这本书一百元。"}]

description: 表示整点。It's 3 o'clock = 现在三点。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's 5 o'clock.","zh":"现在五点了。"}]

description: 今天。What day is today? = 今天星期几？
examples_json: [{"en":"Today is Monday.","zh":"今天是星期一。"}]

description: 感谢用语。Thanks更口语化。You're welcome = 不客气。
examples_json: [{"en":"Thank you for your help.","zh":"谢谢你的帮助。"}]

description: 道歉用语。I'm sorry = 对不起/我很遗憾。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm sorry I'm late.","zh":"对不起我迟到了。"}]

description: 礼貌请求。放在句首或句末。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please sit down.","zh":"请坐。"}]

description: 水。Can I have water? = 能给我水吗？
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I have some water, please?","zh"::能给我一些水吗？"}]

description: 帮助。Help me = 帮我。I need help = 我需要帮助。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you help me?","zh":"你能帮我吗？"}]

description: 疑问词什么。What's this? / What is it?
examples_json: [{"en":"What is your name?","zh":"你叫什么名字？"}]

description: 疑问词谁。Who is he/she?
examples_json: [{"en":"Who is that girl?","zh":"那个女孩是谁？"}]

description: 疑问词哪里。Where is...? = ...在哪里？
examples_json: [{"en":"Where is the bathroom?","zh":"洗手间在哪里？"}]

description: 这里/在这儿。It's here = 它在这儿。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your bag is here.","zh":"你的包在这里。"}]

description: be动词第一人称单数形式。I am = 我是。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am a student.","zh":"我是学生。"}]

description: be动词第三人称单数。He/She/It is。
examples_json: [{"en":"She is a teacher.","zh":"她是一名老师。"}]

description: be动词第二人称和复数。You/We/They are。
examples_json: [{"en":"They are my friends.","zh"::他们是我的朋友。"}]

description: 去。go to school / go home。
examples_json: [{"en":"I go to school every day.","zh":"我每天去上学。"}]

description: 吃。eat breakfast / eat lunch / eat dinner。
examples_json: [{"en":"I eat breakfast at 7.","zh":"我7点吃早餐。"}]

description: 喝。drink water / drink tea。
examples_json: [{"en":"I drink tea every morning.","zh":"我每天早上喝茶。"}]

description: 大的。反义词: small(小的)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The box is big.","zh":"这个盒子很大。"}]

description: 小的。反义词: big。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a small dog.","zh"::我有一只小狗。}],1

description: 红色。基本颜色之一。
examples_json: [{"en":"My bag is red.","zh":"我的包是红色的。"}]

description: 好的。最常用的评价形容词。反义词: bad。
examples_json: [{"en":"The food is very good.","zh":"这个食物很好。"}]

description: 热的/烫的。反义词: cold(冷的)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The soup is hot.","zh":"汤是热的。"}]

description: 开心的/快乐的。I'm happy = 我很开心。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm happy to see you.","zh":"我很高兴见到你。"}]
